name: Sesame Prawn Triangles
recipeIngredient: A few drops of sesame oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the bread slices are dry. If not, place them under a low grill until crisp without browning.
2. Blanch the pork fat in boiling water, then drain thoroughly and chop finely.
3. Roughly chop the prawns and mash them in a basin.
4. Add the chopped pork fat, parsley, spring onions, cornflour, seasoning, sugar, and sesame oil to the mashed prawns. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Spread the prawn mixture onto the bread slices in an even layer using your fingers.
6. Press sesame seeds onto the prawn mixture to create an even coating.
7. Heat the oil for deep frying to 190°C (375°F).
8. Add the sesame-coated slices a few at a time and fry until golden brown. Drain on absorbent kitchen paper.
9. Cut the slices into small neat triangles, then serve hot. Garnish with a few whole cooked prawns if desired.
